lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਕਉਨ ਬਿਧੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਪਰਸਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aisee kaun bidhe darasan parasanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: How may I obtain the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan? ||1||Pause||
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਸਫਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਉਮਗਿ ਹੀਉ ਤਰਸਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aas piaas safal moorat umag heeo tarasanaa |1|
lines.english: I hope and thirst for Your wish-fulfilling image; my heart yearns and longs for You. ||1||
I am the dust of the feet of the Lord's Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਲੀਨ ਪਿਆਸ ਮੀਨ ਸੰਤਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: deen leen piaas meen santanaa har santanaa |
lines.english: The meek and humble Saints are like thirsty fish; the Saints of the Lord are absorbed in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਛੋਡਿਓ ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਭੇਟਨਾ ॥੨॥੨॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: maan mohu tiaag chhoddio tau naanak har jeeo bhettanaa |2|2|35|
lines.english: Renouncing pride and leaving behind emotional attachment, O Nanak, one meets with the Dear Lord. ||2||2||35||
God has become Merciful to me.
I dedicate my heart to them.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਟ ਹਸਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: keett hasat pooran sabh sangaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: From the ant to the elephant, He is permeating and pervading all. ||1||Pause||
The Playful Lord imbues all with the Color of His Love.
They stand naked in the water, enduring hunger and poverty.
They sit cross-legged, perform worship services and do good deeds.
Some go on fasts, make vows, and take pilgrimages to sacred shrines on the Ganges.
They stubbornly practice ritualistic postures, standing on their heads.
They read through the Shaastras, but they do not join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||1||
They apply religious symbols to their bodies, and ceremonial marks to their limbs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਰੋਗੁ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਚੁਕੈ ਨ ਭੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau rog biaapai chukai na bhangaa |
lines.english: They are afflicted with the disease of egotism, and their faults are not covered up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਚੰਗਾ ॥੨॥੩॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: so mukat naanak jis satigur changaa |2|3|36|
lines.english: He alone is liberated, O Nanak, whose True Guru is Good. ||2||3||36||
They burn in the fire of sexual frustration, unresolved anger and compulsive desire.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਭਾਗੇ ਚੋਰ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੁਖੈਨੋ ਹਰੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤੀ ਗਾਵਤੀ ਗਾਵਤੀ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: panch bhaage chor sahaje sukhaino hare gun gaavatee gaavatee gaavatee daras piaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The five thieves have run away, and I am in peace and poise; singing, singing, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I obtain the Blessed Vision of my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਖ ਬੂਝਿ ਗਈ ਗਈ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tikh boojh gee gee mil saadh janaa |
lines.english: My thirst has been quenched, meeting with the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਕਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੋ ਸਿਉ ਮੋ ਸਿਉ ਐਸੀ ਹਉ ਕੈਸੇ ਕਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee karee prabh mo siau mo siau aisee hau kaise krau |
lines.english: That which God has done for me - how can I do that for Him in return?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਉ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਬਲਿ ਬਲੇ ਬਲਿ ਬਲੇ ਬਲਿ ਗਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: heeo tumaare bal bale bal bale bal gee |1|
lines.english: I make my heart a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice to You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਥਾਨੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਕੇਹਰੋ ਜਿਤੁ ਜੰਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh thaan tero keharo jit jantan kar beechaar |
lines.english: O God, where is that Place, where You contemplate all Your beings?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪੈ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਇ ਧਿਆਇ ਧਿਆਇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pahile pai sant paae dhiaae dhiaae preet laae |
lines.english: First, I fall at the feet of the Saints; I meditate, meditate, lovingly attuned to You.
Countless slaves sing Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਜੋ ਭਾਵਤੋ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: soee milio jo bhaavato jan naanak tthaakur rahio samaae |
lines.english: He alone meets You, who is pleasing to Your Will. Servant Nanak remains absorbed in his Lord and Master.
You, You, You alone, Lord. ||2||1||37||
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Eighth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਆਗੀਐ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਮਾਨੁ ਪੇਖਤਾ ਦਇਆਲ ਲਾਲ ਹਾਂ ਹਾਂ ਮਨ ਚਰਨ ਰੇਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tiaageeai gumaan maan pekhataa deaal laal haan haan man charan ren |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Give up your pride and your self-conceit; the Loving, Merciful Lord is watching over all. O mind, become the dust of His Feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਮੰਤ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har sant mant gupaal giaan dhiaan |1|
lines.english: Through the Mantra of the Lord's Saints, experience the spiritual wisdom and meditation of the Lord of the World. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗਾਇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਾਇ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਮੋਹਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai gobind gaae charan kamal preet laae deen deaal mohanaa |
lines.english: Within your heart, sing the Praises of the Lord of the Universe, and be lovingly attuned to His Lotus Feet. He is the Fascinating Lord, Merciful to the meek and the humble.
I have abandoned emotional attachment, doubt and all egotistical pride. ||2||1||38||
O Merciful Lord, please bless me with Your Kindness and Compassion.
Nanak begs for the Gift of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਹਨ ਮਲਨ ਦਹਨ ਲਹਨ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੇ ਆਨ ਨਹੀ ਉਪਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kehan malan dehan lehan gur mile aan nahee upaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Speaking of God, filth and pollution are burnt away; This comes by meeting with the Guru, and not by any other efforts. ||1||Pause||
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:
